# cascivo

CSS-native, signal-driven, AI-first React design system. Components are copy-pasted into
your project (shadcn model) and driven by Preact Signals for fine-grained reactivity.
Every component ships a machine-readable manifest.

## Links

- [Landing](https://cascivo.com): Marketing, live demos, and component gallery
- [Docs](https://docs.cascivo.com): Component reference, props, tokens, and examples
- [Storybook](https://storybook.cascivo.com): Interactive component explorer with all variants
- [Registry](https://cascivo.com/registry.json): Machine-readable component manifest (JSON)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/urbanisierung/cascivo): Source code under MIT licence
- [MCP server](https://github.com/urbanisierung/cascivo/tree/main/packages/mcp): MCP server for AI agent integration
